texto: We conform to pain until we don't notice it anymore
autor: it's what you call — numb — and it tragically blots out our pleasure too.
explicacao: Citação de it's what you call — numb — and it tragically blots out our pleasure too. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “We conform to pain until we don't notice it anymore” articula reflexao, bryant-mcgill, conform em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
